statement.headerDoc:
STEP 991 — Minimal Overlap M(6), M(7), M(8) extension
  =======================================================

  Follow-up to STEP 989 (M(1) = 1 .. M(5) = 3).
  Attempts extension to M(6), M(7), M(8) via same computable M function
  and native_decide on larger partition enumeration.

  Known values (OEIS-referenced, to be verified by native_decide):
    M(6) = ?
    M(7) = ?
    M(8) = ?

  Partition counts:
    C(12, 6) = 924
    C(14, 7) = 3,432
    C(16, 8) = 12,870
    C(18, 9) = 48,620
    C(20, 10) = 184,756

  All counts are small; dominant cost is per-partition MaxOverlap computation

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
